message:
chore(ubs): add .ubsignore policy for UBS noise reduction

Adds a `.ubsignore` policy file that scopes UBS scans to production code
only. Tests, benches, examples, build artifacts, the legacy Redis source
tree, the conformance crate (which intentionally exercises divergences),
golden outputs, baselines, and miscellaneous development scripts are
excluded so `ubs` reports stay focused on the code the release ships.

Also excludes: editor/IDE metadata (`.idea/`, `.vscode/`, `*.swp`,
`*.swo`), and top-level Markdown/`docs/` (documentation rather than
scannable code). No runtime behavior change.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+# UBS Ignore Policy for FrankenRedis
+# This file defines patterns and paths to exclude from UBS scanning
+# to reduce noise from test-only code where unwrap/panic is acceptable.
+
+# Test directories
+**/tests/**
+**/test/**
+**/testing/**
+
+# Benchmark directories (benchmarks typically use unwrap)
+**/benches/**
+**/bench/**
+
+# Example code
+**/examples/**
+
+# Build artifacts and dependencies
+target/
+.git/
+legacy_redis_code/
+
+# Conformance test crate (tests against legacy Redis behavior)
+crates/fr-conformance/
+
+# Test fixtures and golden outputs
+golden_outputs/
+baselines/
+artifacts/
+
+# Development scripts
+scripts/
+
+# Files that are test harnesses
+*_test.rs
+*_tests.rs
+test_*.rs
+tests.rs
+
+# IDE and editor files
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# Documentation
+*.md
+docs/
